overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a blue and green outfit walking through the bridge of a spaceship. The character moves from the front viewport area toward a circular airlock door at the rear, which opens to reveal an exterior docking corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship bridge with pilot stations and forward viewport

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from the front viewport toward the rear of the spaceship bridge, passing the central pilot stations

entered.detail: large curved viewport showing starfield and space outside
twin pilot chairs with control yokes and harnesses
tall standing console with glowing blue interface screens
tall standing console with glowing blue interface screens
illuminated status panel on the ceiling showing ship diagnostics
single auxiliary chair mounted against the left wall
large circular metal door with mechanical locking mechanism at the rear of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the futuristic spaceship bridge, moving away from the forward viewport that shows the starfield outside. The environment features clean white and grey paneling with blue accent lighting, central pilot seats, and control consoles lining the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear airlock transition to exterior docking corridor

events.description: circular airlock door slides open revealing the docking corridor outside

agents.ego_description: approaching the circular airlock door and proceeding through the opening into the exterior corridor

entered.detail: exterior walkway with metal railings visible through the opening airlock door

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the rear of the bridge where the circular airlock door opens to reveal an exterior docking corridor. The transition from the enclosed bridge to the open corridor marks the end of the interior traversal, with the mechanical door sliding open to allow passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the command center of a futuristic spaceship toward an exterior docking area. It begins by trailing a character in a blue and green outfit as they walk away from a forward viewport overlooking a vast starfield. As the character progresses, the camera glides past clean white and grey paneling, blue accent lighting, and rows of control consoles and pilot seats. The scene then shifts toward the rear of the bridge, where the enclosed interior environment meets a mechanical circular airlock. Finally, the door slides open, transitioning the view from the sterile bridge into the open expanse of an exterior docking corridor.
